channel.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast
channel.description: In under 10 minutes, get the most important AI stories, distilled into sharp insights and real-world impact. No fluff. No jargon. Just what matters and what’s next.
channel.itunes:summary: In under 10 minutes, get the most important AI stories, distilled into sharp insights and real-world impact. No fluff. No jargon. Just what matters and what’s next.
channel.itunes:author: Helix

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - March 24, 2026
item.description: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.
item.content:encoded: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - March 24, 2026
item.itunes:summary: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.

item.title: Chips in Orbit, Helium Crisis & AI Video Explodes | Helix.AI Daily — Wednesday, March 25, 2026
item.description: On this Wednesday, March 25, 2026 episode, Helix.AI covers seven major AI headlines including Nvidia’s trillion-dollar Blackwell projection and orbital data centers, a critical helium shortage threatening chip supply chains, Meta shutting down Horizon Worlds, and Yann LeCun’s billion-dollar AI reasoning startup. The Wednesday spotlight dives deep into AI for Images and Video, featuring Gamma Imagine, xAI’s Grok video generation, and Google Veo 3.1’s cinematic AI video capabilities. The episode also covers AI regulation momentum, Apple’s Siri overhaul, AMD’s new AI processors, and major infrastructure funding rounds.
item.content:encoded: On this Wednesday, March 25, 2026 episode, Helix.AI covers seven major AI headlines including Nvidia’s trillion-dollar Blackwell projection and orbital data centers, a critical helium shortage threatening chip supply chains, Meta shutting down Horizon Worlds, and Yann LeCun’s billion-dollar AI reasoning startup. The Wednesday spotlight dives deep into AI for Images and Video, featuring Gamma Imagine, xAI’s Grok video generation, and Google Veo 3.1’s cinematic AI video capabilities. The episode also covers AI regulation momentum, Apple’s Siri overhaul, AMD’s new AI processors, and major infrastructure funding rounds.
item.itunes:title: Chips in Orbit, Helium Crisis & AI Video Explodes | Helix.AI Daily — Wednesday, March 25, 2026
item.itunes:summary: On this Wednesday, March 25, 2026 episode, Helix.AI covers seven major AI headlines including Nvidia’s trillion-dollar Blackwell projection and orbital data centers, a critical helium shortage threatening chip supply chains, Meta shutting down Horizon Worlds, and Yann LeCun’s billion-dollar AI reasoning startup. The Wednesday spotlight dives deep into AI for Images and Video, featuring Gamma Imagine, xAI’s Grok video generation, and Google Veo 3.1’s cinematic AI video capabilities. The episode also covers AI regulation momentum, Apple’s Siri overhaul, AMD’s new AI processors, and major infrastructure funding rounds.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Thursday, March 26, 2026
item.description: On this Thursday, March 26, 2026 episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers OpenAI's dramatic shutdown of the Sora video app and end of its $1B Disney deal, Elon Musk's $20B Terafab chip factory launch, and the Sanders/AOC moratorium bill on AI data centers. The Thursday AI for Families segment examines Senator Blackburn's AI duty-of-care framework for children, the White House's parental controls push, and HeyOtto's new purpose-built AI platform for kids ages 6-18.
item.content:encoded: On this Thursday, March 26, 2026 episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers OpenAI's dramatic shutdown of the Sora video app and end of its $1B Disney deal, Elon Musk's $20B Terafab chip factory launch, and the Sanders/AOC moratorium bill on AI data centers. The Thursday AI for Families segment examines Senator Blackburn's AI duty-of-care framework for children, the White House's parental controls push, and HeyOtto's new purpose-built AI platform for kids ages 6-18.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Thursday, March 26, 2026
item.itunes:summary: On this Thursday, March 26, 2026 episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers OpenAI's dramatic shutdown of the Sora video app and end of its $1B Disney deal, Elon Musk's $20B Terafab chip factory launch, and the Sanders/AOC moratorium bill on AI data centers. The Thursday AI for Families segment examines Senator Blackburn's AI duty-of-care framework for children, the White House's parental controls push, and HeyOtto's new purpose-built AI platform for kids ages 6-18.
